title: BITS Pilani Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
short_info: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Postdoctoral Fellow (PDF) Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Postdoctoral Fellow (PDF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD degree (or thesis submitted) in Mechanical Engineering or allied disciplines, with strong publication record in Refrigeration, Thermal Engineering, Energy Systems, Heat Pumps, Sustainable Cooling Technologies, CFD, Modelling and Simulation, or related fields
qualification.details: PhD degree (or thesis submitted) in Mechanical Engineering or allied disciplines, with strong publication record in Refrigeration, Thermal Engineering, Energy Systems, Heat Pumps, Sustainable Cooling Technologies, CFD, Modelling and Simulation, or related fields.

salary_details.details: Rs. 70,000/- + Rs. 10,000/- per month as research consumables/contingency allowance

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
